Do not use or request Python, calculators, code execution, browsing, files,

shortened for an external holdout check. Reconstruct one compact deterministic

short check summary. Return one JSON object only, with no Markdown, comments,
code fences, or text outside the JSON.

Predict exactly the next 6 terms. The first 1 predictions will be checked against terms withheld from you, and the remaining five are the forecast under evaluation.
